name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.PointGunHelper.FallingLimits
summary: 0= don't apply limits.  1=apply the limits below only when the character is falling.  2 =  always apply these limits (instead of applying maxAngleAcross and maxAngleAway which only limits the horizontal angle but implicity limits the updown (the limit shape is a vertical hinge).
remarks:
Default value = 0.
            Min value = 0.
            Max value = 2.
